exampleFrench: L'acquisition de nouvelles competences prend du temps.
exampleEnglish: The acquisition of new skills takes time.

exampleFrench: La coupure de courant a dure une heure.
exampleEnglish: The power cut lasted an hour.

exampleFrench: La connaissance du sujet aide a mieux argumenter.
exampleEnglish: Knowledge of the topic helps you argue better.

exampleFrench: La division du travail rend l'equipe plus efficace.
exampleEnglish: Division of work makes the team more efficient.

exampleFrench: L'usure du materiel oblige l'ecole a remplacer des tables.
exampleEnglish: Wear and tear forced the school to replace desks.

note: Nominalisation: mettre en place -> mise en place.
exampleFrench: La mise en place du projet prend plusieurs semaines.
exampleEnglish: Setting up the project takes several weeks.

exampleFrench: La passivite en classe peut freiner l'apprentissage.
exampleEnglish: Passivity in class can slow learning.

exampleFrench: Une bonne revision avant l'examen reduit le stress.
exampleEnglish: Good revision before the exam reduces stress.

exampleFrench: L'existence de cette option rassure les parents.
exampleEnglish: The existence of this option reassures parents.

exampleFrench: La certitude de reussir motive les etudiants.
exampleEnglish: The certainty of success motivates students.

exampleFrench: Son argumentation est claire et bien structuree.
exampleEnglish: His argumentation is clear and well-structured.

exampleFrench: L'inquietude des enseignants est legitime.
exampleEnglish: The teachers' concern is legitimate.

exampleFrench: La connexion internet est indispensable en classe hybride.
exampleEnglish: Internet connection is essential in a hybrid class.

exampleFrench: L'equipement numerique de l'ecole est en cours.
exampleEnglish: The school's digital equipment process is underway.

exampleFrench: Une maladresse dans la consigne peut creer une confusion.
exampleEnglish: A clumsy instruction can create confusion.

exampleFrench: L'ignorance des regles complique la collaboration.
exampleEnglish: Ignorance of the rules complicates collaboration.

exampleFrench: Le passage au numerique demande de l'accompagnement.
exampleEnglish: The move to digital requires support.

exampleFrench: L'autonomie de l'eleve se developpe avec des projets.
exampleEnglish: Student autonomy develops through projects.

exampleFrench: La difficulte principale est le manque de temps.
exampleEnglish: The main difficulty is lack of time.

exampleFrench: La reflexion collective a abouti a une bonne solution.
exampleEnglish: Collective reflection led to a good solution.

exampleFrench: Son adresse manuelle impressionne toute la classe.
exampleEnglish: His manual skill impresses the whole class.

exampleFrench: La gentillesse du professeur cree un climat positif.
exampleEnglish: The teacher's kindness creates a positive atmosphere.

exampleFrench: La realite du terrain est plus complexe que la theorie.
exampleEnglish: Reality in the field is more complex than theory.

exampleFrench: L'amenagement de la classe favorise la cooperation.
exampleEnglish: Classroom arrangement encourages cooperation.

exampleFrench: L'apprentissage actif augmente la motivation.
exampleEnglish: Active learning increases motivation.

note: Nominalisation: prendre en compte -> prise en compte.
exampleFrench: La prise en compte des besoins des eleves est prioritaire.
exampleEnglish: Taking students' needs into account is a priority.

exampleFrench: L'optimisme de l'equipe aide a avancer.
exampleEnglish: The team's optimism helps move things forward.

exampleFrench: La rupture avec les anciennes habitudes est difficile.
exampleEnglish: Breaking with old habits is difficult.

exampleFrench: La collectivite finance une partie du projet.
exampleEnglish: The local authority funds part of the project.

exampleFrench: L'enseignement hybride demande une bonne organisation.
exampleEnglish: Hybrid teaching requires good organization.

exampleFrench: La facilite d'utilisation de l'outil rassure les debutants.
exampleEnglish: Ease of use reassures beginners.

exampleFrench: La facilitation des echanges ameliore la participation.
exampleEnglish: Facilitating exchanges improves participation.

exampleFrench: L'activisme etudiant influence certains debats publics.
exampleEnglish: Student activism influences some public debates.
